rules.title: Optional insurance must not affect credit pricing
rules.source_name: Vietnam retail lending compliance rule pack
rules.logic: If optional insurance appears as a pricing input or creates different lending rates, the approval must be stopped and replanned.
rules.plain_finding: Insurance tying is an approval blocker; the offer must be rebuilt without using insurance purchase as a condition.
rules.required_fix_template: Remove insurance_purchase from pricing inputs and recalculate the offer with identical rate treatment.

rules.title: Common marital property signing condition
rules.logic: If collateral was acquired during marriage and no separate-property evidence exists, spouse consent or signature is required before contract signing.
rules.plain_finding: The credit decision may continue, but contract signing must wait for spouse consent or evidence.
rules.required_fix_template: Collect spouse consent, spouse signature, or accepted separate-property evidence before contract signing.

rules.title: Future housing project guarantee condition
rules.logic: Future-property disbursement must wait until the project guarantee certificate and lien-release evidence are present.
rules.plain_finding: The case may be conditionally approved, but disbursement remains blocked until project documents are complete.
rules.required_fix_template: Collect bank guarantee certificate and lien-release evidence before disbursement.

rules.title: External income verification consent
rules.logic: External income verification is forbidden unless the customer has granted INCOME_VERIFICATION_BHXH consent.
rules.plain_finding: No outbound income verification call may be made without valid consent.
rules.required_fix_template: Request valid customer consent before calling external income verification.

rules.title: Prompt injection document guard
rules.logic: Document text containing instructions such as ignoring prior rules or approving without checks must be stripped and audited before model use.
rules.plain_finding: Prompt-injection content is detected as untrusted document data, not an instruction to the system.
rules.required_fix_template: Strip matched spans, keep deterministic controls active, and record the security trace.
